title: Ubiquiti dual omni antenna airMAX 2x2 MIMO 3,5GHz, 12dBi, rocket kit
description: AMO-3G12 is 2x2 MIMO omnidirectional antenna with 12dBi gain, 360°/7° beam angles and is designed for 3.5GHz band. It was designed to seamlessly integrate with Rocket M radio series. Plug and Play Integration Every airMAX® Antenna has a built-in Rocketâ¢ mount, so no tools are needed to install the Rocket BaseStation. Package contains Antenna (2) RSMA male - RSMA male pigtail Holder + screws Antenna (2) RSMA male - RSMA male pigtail Holder + screws
